subject: LIGO/Virgo/KAGRA S230819ax: Correction to PROB_BBH and PROB_TERRES probabilities
submitter: Anjali Yelikar at Rochester Institute of Technology <ay2016@g.rit.edu>
body:
The LIGO Scientific Collaboration, the Virgo Collaboration, and the KAGRA Collaboration report:
The trigger S230819ax had incorrect PROB_BBH and PROB_TERRES probabilities reported in the Update Circular number 34499. The correct values are 99% and 1% as reported in the Update Notice.
